---
title: "Sampling_design_R"
---

```{r}
library(spsurvey)
set.seed(51)
```

```{r}
aoi = read_sf(dsn = "D:/Conservation_Biology/2025_Osa_Conservation/DATA_YN/data_major_landocvers_LST_comparison", layer = "landcover_210_pure_YN_5367_major_landcov_100elev_max")
```

```{r}
head(aoi)

```

```         
```

```{r}
strata_n = c('10' = 100,'11'= 100, '13' = 100, '30' = 100, '50' = 100)
strat_eqprob = grts(aoi, n_base = strata_n, stratum_var = "grid_code")

strat_eqprob
```

```{r}
head(strat_eqprob)
```

```{r}
plot(strat_eqprob, aoi, key.width = lcm(3))
```

```{r}
combined <- sp_rbind(strat_eqprob)
write_sf(combined, "sample_points_test1.shp")
```
